Objects.Name: [Module] Toxic Area
Objects.Notes: An area that kills the player after a certain amount of time spent inside of it, similar to the toxic gas from Super Mario 64.

Classes.Name: ToxicArea
Classes.Notes: An area that will kill the player if they spend a configurable time inside of it. The player will have an air meter, and can restore their air by collecting coins or popping air bubbles.

Obj_arg0.Name: Kill Timer
Obj_arg0.Description: The time in frames it takes for the player to die inside this area. Default is 500.

Obj_arg1.Name: Coin Restore Amount
Obj_arg1.Description: The percentage of time to restore upon collecting a coin between 0 and 100. Default is 20.

Obj_arg2.Name: Bubble Restore Amount
Obj_arg2.Description: The percentage of time to restore upon popping an air bubble between 0 and 100. Default is 30.

SW_A.Description: Enables the area if the switch is activated, and disables it when deactivated.
